hero.tagline: Specialised GxP Auditing, PV Consulting & Training Services
hero.heading: GXP AUDITING & PV CONSULTING
hero.description: At PVCON, we deliver end-to-end GxP auditing, pharmacovigilance consulting, and corporate training — partnering with MAHs, Sponsors, and CROs worldwide to achieve sustained regulatory compliance and operational excellence.

logos.tagline: Trusted by MAHs, CROs & Sponsors across the globe

aboutSection.label: About
aboutSection.heading: PVCON
paragraphs: PVCON is a premier global provider of independent GxP Auditing, Pharmacovigilance Consulting, and Professional Training services, supporting pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device organizations across 100+ countries.

Recognized for its integrity, independence, and technical excellence, PVCON serves as a trusted "One-Stop Partner" for comprehensive Pharmacovigilance Audit and Quality solutions, helping clients navigate complex regulatory landscapes with confidence.

items.title: Vision
items.description: To be globally recognized as the benchmark for quality, integrity, and excellence in GxP Auditing, Consulting, and Training.

items.title: Mission
items.description: To be the leading service provider of choice for global independent GxP Auditing, Consulting and Training to the pharmaceutical, biotechnology and device industries.

flagshipSolutions.label: Flagship Solutions
flagshipSolutions.heading: What We Do Best
flagshipSolutions.description: Four core pillars of expertise that define PVCON — each delivered with precision, deep regulatory knowledge, and a commitment to safeguarding patient safety worldwide.

audit.title: Audits & Inspection Readiness
audit.description: Comprehensive PV, GCP and GxP Audits, CAPA Planning, Mock Inspections and Gap Analysis prepare organizations for successful regulatory inspections with proactive compliance readiness.

pvoi.title: Local PVoI Services
pvoi.description: PVCON provides Local PvOI support services in India, ensuring dedicated pharmacovigilance oversight aligned with CDSCO expectations. We enable organizations for inspection-ready PV systems with clear accountability.

qms.title: PV QMS & System Setup
qms.description: At PVCON, we design and implement robust QMS frameworks—from SOP writing to complete PV system setup—ensuring inspection-ready, scalable, and sustainable Pharmacovigilance Systems.

training.title: Training & Upskilling
training.description: PVCON offers industry-aligned training and upskilling programs designed for both students and professionals in pharmacovigilance. Our programs focus on practical knowledge, hands-on experience, and real-world readiness.

whyChooseUs.heading: Why Choose Us
paragraphs: At PVCON, quality and compliance serve as the cornerstone of our operations, driving every engagement we undertake. We are deeply committed to upholding the highest standards of pharmacovigilance practice — a commitment that spans every service we deliver and every regulatory landscape we navigate.

Our objective is to consistently elevate the safety, quality, and regulatory integrity of our clients' operations. To achieve this, we deploy robust audit frameworks, comprehensive training programs, and proactive compliance strategies aligned with current ICH, EU GVP, and global GxP guidelines.

Our team has partnered with a diverse range of organizations — from emerging biotech startups to established global pharmaceutical enterprises — delivering tailored solutions across pharmacovigilance consulting, clinical audits, vendor qualification, QPPV services, and regulatory inspection readiness.

items.title: Audits & Inspection
items.description: Comprehensive pharmacovigilance audit and quality oversight services designed to ensure global regulatory compliance, operational excellence, and inspection readiness.

bullets.title: Comprehensive PV Audits
bullets.description: Affiliate Country Office, System, Vendor, and Co-Marketing Partner audits conducted globally with detailed CAPA recommendations and audit certification.

bullets.title: Quality System Development & Oversight
bullets.description: Design and implementation of robust PV Quality Management Systems including Master Quality Plans, risk-based internal audit strategies, and technology-enabled management of audits, inspections, and CAPAs.

bullets.title: Inspection Readiness & Regulatory Support
bullets.description: End-to-end MAH inspection preparation support, including structured response development for regulatory inspection findings and sustained compliance oversight.

items.title: GxP Auditing
items.description: Comprehensive GxP audit solutions ensuring regulatory compliance, quality assurance, and operational integrity across clinical, laboratory, manufacturing, and vendor environments.

bullets.title: Clinical & Investigator Audits (GCP)
bullets.description: Investigator site audits, Phase I audits, for-cause audits, sponsor and CRO system audits, and investigational product supply oversight to ensure full GCP compliance.

bullets.title: Vendor, CRO & IT Qualification
bullets.description: CRO due diligence audits, vendor qualification audits, data management audits, and IT system qualification reviews to safeguard quality and regulatory alignment.

bullets.title: Laboratory & Manufacturing Compliance
bullets.description: GCLP, GLP, and GMP audits including archival site audits, drug destruction unit audits, and flexible on-site or remote audit execution to ensure end-to-end lifecycle compliance.

items.title: Corporate Training
items.description: Structured pharmacovigilance training programs designed to strengthen regulatory knowledge, operational readiness, and quality culture within MAH and stakeholder environments.

bullets.title: Training Framework & Matrix Development
bullets.description: Design and implementation of comprehensive training matrices, structured plans, and customized training materials aligned with regulatory expectations.

bullets.title: MAH Boot Camps & Stakeholder Training
bullets.description: Intensive boot camps and focused stakeholder training programs tailored for MAH setups to enhance inspection readiness and operational competence.

bullets.title: Regulatory & Good PV Practice Updates
bullets.description: Customized training on Good Pharmacovigilance Practices, evolving safety regulations, and global compliance requirements.

pricing.sectionDescription: Flexible plans tailored to your pharmacovigilance needs.

testimonials.sectionDescription: Hear from those who have partnered with us.

items.message: Moin is one of the most well-known Pharmacovigilance Professionals in India. He has been instrumental in providing adequate guidance on Pharmacovigilance regulations and regulatory expectations. We hired Moin for auditing our PV department and country affiliates, and he and his team did an excellent job — not only auditing but also providing the right guidance for facing inspections. Moin has always been genuine and has always gone beyond his scope of work to help and support us. With his in-depth subject knowledge and very practical approach, it has been easy for us to gain deep insight into pharmacovigilance.

We engaged PVCON for setting up our Pharmacovigilance practices and processes from scratch. Moin did a phenomenal job in setting up our SOPs, training and upskilling the Medical & Safety Affairs and Clinical Operations team, and helping us develop a unique value proposition for sponsors — all within a few weeks. His professionalism, in-depth knowledge, industry experience, and most importantly his genuineness make it a pleasure working with him. He is one of the most high-calibre professionals I have had the pleasure of working with, and PVCON provided us with a quantum value add.

items.question: What services does PVCON provide?
items.answer: PVCON provides dedicated GxP services from Pharmacovigilance & GCP Audits (including gap analysis and mock inspections) to PV system setup, from PSMF creation to Local PVoI services, a whole range of PV Consulting, especially for regulatory inspection readiness. We provide end-to-end support designed to elevate the safety, quality, and regulatory integrity of your operations; with PV training and mentorship services.

items.question: What is PvOI / Pharmacovigilance Officer in Charge?
items.answer: PvOI (Pharmacovigilance Officer in Charge) is the designated person responsible for overseeing pharmacovigilance activities and ensuring regulatory compliance in India and is a legally required role for several global organizations, the way a ‘QPPV’ role is mandatory for MAHs in EEA. PVCON provides expert local QPPV/ PvOI services in India, including safety oversight, regulatory communication, deputized coverage, PSMF preparation, etc. ensuring an inspection-ready PV system.

items.question: How does PVCON support MAH inspection readiness?
items.answer: PVCON provides end-to-end inspection readiness support for MAHs including gap analysis of the PV system against regulatory requirements, mock inspection exercises, structured response frameworks for regulatory findings, CAPA management, and ongoing post-inspection compliance oversight.

items.question: Which regulatory frameworks do you work with?
items.answer: PVCON operates across all major global regulatory frameworks with the presence of local Consultants, including the EMA GVP Modules, US FDA regulations, ICH guidelines, MHRA expectations (UK), PMDA requirements (Japan), Arab League (ME) , NMPA guidance (China), and CDSCO regulations (India), among other regulations and guidance.

items.question: Do you offer remote auditing services?
items.answer: Yes. PVCON offers both on-site and remote auditing options. Our remote/virtual audit methodology is fully aligned with regulatory expectations and has been validated across multiple jurisdictions, offering flexibility without compromising audit quality or depth. We also offer Desktop/Questionnaire audits.

items.question: How can I get started with PVCON?
items.answer: Contact us at info@pvcon.in with a brief description of your needs. Our team will reply back to you within one business day to schedule a complimentary discovery call and outline a tailored service proposal to suit your requirements. Upon mutual agreement, the actions immediately roll out, with PVCON’s dedicated point of contact (POC) ensuring the milestones are continuously met.

items.question: What PSMF services do you offer?
items.answer: We offer all PSMF management services, including PSMF maintenance as a service; especially within our SaaS software, the ongoing updates and continuous upkeep of organization’s core PSMF and the annexures becomes extremely simplified because of the tool’s workflow automation, and with the help of AI.

globalPresence.heading: Our Global Presence
globalPresence.subtitle: From our headquarters in Mumbai (India), PVCON serves clients across the globe — delivering GxP audits, pharmacovigilance consulting, and regulatory support wherever our partners need us.

items.description: Audits Conducted across the globe, ensuring regulatory compliance and operational excellence for our clients.
Years of experience in GxP Auditing, Pharmacovigilance Consulting, and Corporate Training services for the pharmaceutical industry.
Man years of combined experience among our team of expert auditors and consultants, delivering high-quality services to clients worldwide.

productSpotlight.heading: PSMF Manager
productSpotlight.description: The industry's first AI-powered SaaS platform for Pharmacovigilance System Master File management. Automate compliance, eliminate manual errors, and stay inspection-ready — always.
